releaseNotes:
- UI modernization and navigation improvements, and many more...

Team Netra

changelog.text: Introduced VoIP support for Watch Party enabling real-time voice communication between users.
Added in-app chat support allowing users to directly communicate with the developer.
Improved MX Player integration and enhanced NetMirror cookie fetching reliability.
Refined UI of TV home screen and settings page for a smoother and cleaner experience.

lockMessage: The app is temporarily locked for maintenance. Please check back later.
